channel.title: Wisconsin Sports (Core Teams)
channel.description: Packers, Bucks, Brewers scores + UW Badgers scores & news.

item.title: Brewers News: Fischer one of World Baseball Classic’s top prospect performers

NCAAM • Final: Wisconsin Badgers 65 @ Michigan Wolverines 68 (Final)
item.description: Wisconsin Badgers vs Michigan Wolverines — Final

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers to face Wolverines in Big Ten semifinals
item.description: After earning a three-point win over Washington on Thursday, the No. 5-seeded Wisconsin men's basketball team will take on No. 4 Illinois on Friday in the quarterfinals of the 2026 Big Ten Tournament. Tip is set for 1:30 p.m. at the United Center in Chicago.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers rally past Illini to advance to Big Ten semis
item.description: Boyd and Blackwell both go over 30 in come-from-behind OT win

item.title: MLB • Final: Athletics 13 @ Milwaukee Brewers 4 (Final)
item.description: Athletics vs Milwaukee Brewers — Final

item.title: NCAAM • Final: Wisconsin Badgers 91 @ Illinois Fighting Illini 88 (Final/OT)
item.description: Wisconsin Badgers vs Illinois Fighting Illini — Final/OT

item.title: Brewers News: Priester (wrist) to start season on IL, but is hopeful stay will be brief
item.description: Right-hander currently on track to continue throwing despite injury similar to thoracic outlet syndrome

UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers get to face No. 4 Illini in Big Ten Quarterfinals
item.description: After earning a three-point win over Washington on Thursday, the No. 5-seeded Wisconsin men's basketball team will take on No. 4 Illinois on Friday in the quarterfinals of the 2026 Big Ten Tournament. Tip is set for 1:30 p.m. at the United Center in Chicago.

item.title: MLB • Final: Milwaukee Brewers 0 @ Cleveland Guardians 1 (Final)
item.description: Milwaukee Brewers vs Cleveland Guardians — Final

item.title: NBA • Final: Milwaukee Bucks 105 @ Miami Heat 112 (Final)
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks vs Miami Heat — Final

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Blackwell's career-high lifts Badgers past Washington
item.description: Wisconsin men's basketball junior John Blackwell dropped a career-high 34 points as No. 23 UW won their opening-round of the Big Ten Tournament, 85-82, over Washington on Thursday at the United Center in Chicago.

item.title: Brewers News: From Spring Breakout to Major League stardom in the blink of an eye

item.description: Washington Huskies vs Wisconsin Badgers — Final

MLB • Final: Milwaukee Brewers 3 @ Cincinnati Reds 6 (Final)
item.description: Milwaukee Brewers vs Cincinnati Reds — Final

item.title: Brewers News: Taking a look at Brewers' potential Opening Day roster
UW News • Men's Basketball: Five Things to Know: Badgers tipoff Big Ten Tournament
UW News • Men's Basketball: Trio of Badgers earn Big Ten honors
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team earned a trio of Big Ten honors on Tuesday, headlined by second-team All-Big Ten recognition for graduate student Nick Boyd, while John Blackwell picked up third-team All-Big Ten honors.

item.title: Brewers News: Crew's top prospect returns to Minors after impressing in 1st big league spring

Brewers News: 1 position battle still undecided for each team
UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers earn No. 5 seed in Big Ten Tournament
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Wisconsin men's basketball team earned the No. 5 seed in the 2026 Big Ten Men's Basketball Tournament presented by TIAA and will play on Thursday at approximately 1:30 p.m. CT at the United Center in Chicago.

item.title: Brewers News: Reddit AMA: How many HRs for Turang? Made coming in '26?
Brewers News: No. 6 prospect Fischer homers in Italy's win over Great Britain
Brewers News: 'Unc' Woodruff makes Brewers spring debut, but it's fall he's focused on
UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers steam past No. 15 Boilermakers, 97-93
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — Thanks to 48 combined points from Nick Boyd and John Blackwell, the Wisconsin men's basketball team steamed past No. 15 Purdue, 97-93, on Saturday in a raucous Mackey Arena.

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Football : 2026 Pro Day media availability
item.description: Wisconsin's NFL Draft prospects met with the media after Pro Day drills on Friday

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Five Things to Know: UW vs. No. 15 Purdue
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team looks to knock off No. 15 Purdue in the regular season finale at Mackey Arena on Saturday in West Lafayette, Indiana.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers cruise past Maryland on senior night
item.description: The Wisconsin men's basketball team cruised past Maryland, 78-45, on senior night, closing out their regular season home slate on Wednesday at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: No. 15 Wisconsin falls to No. 10 Illinois, 82-70
item.description: Uchena's career-high 24 points not enough

item.title: UW News • Football: Badgers announce staff additions
item.description: Confesor named wide recievers coach, Ligashesky added as special teams coordinator, among other changes

item.title: UW News • Football: Homecoming game set for Oct. 3
item.description: Events to begin week of Sept. 28

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Wisconsin begins Big Ten Tournament Run in Indy
item.description: No. 15 seed Wisconsin faces the No. 10 Fighting Illini

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin to play Illinois in first round of Big Ten Tournament
item.description: Badgers open conference tournament play against the Fighting Illini

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers drop regular season finale to No. 9 Iowa
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The Wisconsin women's basketball team (13-16, 5-13 B1G) dropped its regular season finale versus No. 9 Iowa (24-5, 15-3 B1G), 81-52, on Senior Day at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Badgers welcome Hawkeyes for Senior Day showdown
item.description: Badgers will honor five seniors pregame

item.title: UW News • Football: Badgers send two to NFL Combine
item.description: Mason Reiger and Vinny Anthony II head to Indy as draft prep continues

item.title: UW News • Football: Mason Reiger NFL Combine Media Interview
item.description: Mason Reiger met with the media at the 2026 NFL Combine

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers fall to Bruins, 80-60
item.description: Dorja Zaja ties her career-high 16 points

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Badgers face No. 2 Bruins on the road
item.description: Badgers set to play at Pauley Pavilion for the first time in program history

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers fall to USC, 66-59
item.description: Wisconsin breaks single season three point record

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Wisconsin set for Thursday night thriller at USC
item.description: Badgers set to play at Galen Center for the first time in program history

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Six Badgers Headed to WNTCT Training in Colorado
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Six Badgers on the Wisconsin volleyball team are headed to Colorado Springs for the 2026 Women's National Team Collegiate Training at the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Training Center from February 19-22.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin falls to Minnesota, 83-60
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Wisconsin women's basketball team (13-13, 5-10 B1G) fell, 83-60, to the Minnesota Golden Gophers (19-6, 10-4 B1G) Sunday evening at the Kohl Center.

item.title: UW News • Football: Building the Badgers | Colton Joseph and Kenny Guiton
item.description: Hear from QBs coach Kenny Guiton and new Badger signal caller Colton Joseph

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Announces Summer Camps
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin Volleyball program is thrilled to announce its 2026 summer volleyball camps!  This summer, Wisconsin Volleyball will be offering sessions for young kids, middle schoolers, and high school students. Wisconsin camps are geared to individuals of all levels including those just starting the sport to those that have been playing at the highest of levels. Join us this summer for instruction, drills, and an unforgettable experience.

item.title: Brewers News: NEW for 2026: Stream Crew games on Brewers.TV
UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Announces Spring Schedule
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team announces it's four-match spring schedule, featuring one home match against Northern Illinois on April 24.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Tickets on Sale for AVCA First Serve
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team will kick-off the 2026 season in Milwaukee at the Fiserv Forum in the 2026 AVCA First Serve where eight elite teams, including the Badgers, will open the new season. Tickets are now on sale for the event on August 21-23.

item.title: UW News • Football: 2026 football schedule revealed
item.description: Big Ten matchups are set for 2026

item.title: UW News • Football: 2026 Season Tickets On Sale Now
UW News • Volleyball: Booth, Simon garner Volleyball awards
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The 2025 Wisconsin volleyball team celebrated their annual program banquet at Union South on Saturday, presenting the winners of the Bring It! and Most Improved Awards.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers to Play in 2026 AVCA First Serve
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Mark the calendars as the Wisconsin volleyball team will compete at the 2026 American Volleyball Coaches Association (AVCA) First Serve, held at Milwaukee's Fiserv Forum from August 21-23, 2026.

item.title: UW News • Football: Posa earns Freshman All-America honors
item.description: Freshman LB led Wisconsin with 61 tackles

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin adds Jayden Everett to coaching staff
item.description: Jayden Everett joins the UW staff as running backs coach

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Colyer Named CWSA Honda Cup Finalist
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – After a prolific season with the Wisconsin volleyball team, outside hitter Mimi Colyer has been named a finalist in volleyball for the 2026 Honda Cup – the Collegiate Women Sports Award presented by Honda, announced by the CWSA Wednesday afternoon.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Booth signs with Italian Serie A1 League
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - After an illustrious collegiate career, middle blocker Carter Booth has signed with the Unione Yamamay Busto Arisizio of the Italian Serie A1 League to begin her professional tenure.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Wisconsin lands at No. 8 in Fall Learfield Directors' Cup
item.description: The National Association of Collegiate Directors of Athletics and LEARFIELD released its Fall Division I Learfield Directors' Cup standings this Tuesday, with Wisconsin placing eighth after a another successful fall season.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball adds Travis and Hoppe
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - Head coach Kelly Sheffield of the Wisconsin volleyball program has announced the signing of outside hitter Eva Travis from UC Santa Barbara and setter Isabelle Hoppe from Pine-Richland High School in Gibsonia, Pa. Both Travis and Hoppe will arrive for spring semester of 2026.

item.title: Brewers News: Solve today's Brewers trivia puzzle
Brewers News: Brewers' Top 30 Prospects list
item.description: Who do the Brewers have in the pipeline? Get scouting reports, video, stats, projected ETAs and more for Milwaukee's Top 30 Prospects.
